---
title: "meeting_discussion"
output: html_document
---

# 29th May

outline added to paper git repo made

How to orgniase examples

1.  Example 1: Different SDs: choosing effect metrics: mean difference vs cohen's d

2.  Example 2: True null apparent differences from sampling error

3.  Example 3: Small true effect + publication bias → inflated original estimates

4.  Example 4 Small observed difference → equivalence testing
